title: /cat send contents of file
description: Slash command: /cat <path> — read the file at path and send its contents as a chat message. Path relative to cwd. Should enforce a size cap (e.g. 4KB) and refuse to send binary files. Useful for sharing config snippets, logs, code.
close_reason: implemented in cli/src/commands.rs: /who, /me (CTCP ACTION), /cat (4KB text file), /! (shell stdout), /alias (contacts.json persistence), /clear; Ctrl+L handled natively by rustyline
